design_name: An ergonomic office chair assembly featuring a 5-spoke star base, central support column, contoured seat pan, and a tilted backrest connected via a steel bracket.
prompt:
Design an office chair assembly with the following specifications (in millimeters): Base: a 5-spoke star pattern radiating from a central cylinder (diameter 50mm), overall base footprint diameter 600mm. Each spoke has a diameter of 40mm and a length of 275mm. Central support column: cylinder, 400mm tall, 50mm diameter. Seat pan: rounded square plate, 450mm x 450mm, thickness 30mm, featuring a 5mm ergonomic contour dip in the center. Backrest: rectangular plate, 400mm wide, 500mm high, 20mm thick, curved backward at a 15-degree angle, connected to the rear bottom of the seat pan by a 50mm wide x 10mm thick x 150mm high vertical steel bracket.

Confirmed measurements:
  base_cylinder_diameter_mm: 50
  base_diameter_mm: 600
  support_column_height_mm: 400
  support_column_diameter_mm: 50
  seat_pan_width_mm: 450
  seat_pan_length_mm: 450
  seat_pan_thickness_mm: 30
  seat_pan_contour_dip_mm: 5
  backrest_width_mm: 400
  backrest_height_mm: 500
  backrest_thickness_mm: 20
  backrest_angle_deg: 15
  bracket_width_mm: 50
  bracket_thickness_mm: 10
  spoke_diameter_mm: 40
  spoke_length_mm: 275
  bracket_height_mm: 150
